---
title: "B05012"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
raw <- list.files(path = "../Raw Data CCD", pattern = "B05012-Data.csv", full.names = TRUE,  recursive = TRUE)
all_dfs <- list() 
for (i in raw) {
  Year <- as.numeric(str_extract(i, "20\\d{2}"))
  temp <- read.csv(i, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
  names(temp) <- names(temp) %>%
    str_replace_all("[:!\\.]", "_") %>% 
    str_replace_all("_+", "_") %>%
    str_remove("_$") %>%
    str_trim()
  temp$Year <- Year
  all_dfs[[i]] <- temp
}

all_data <- bind_rows(all_dfs) %>%
  select(Year, everything()) %>%
  select(-contains("Margin")) %>%
  select(-"X") %>%
  mutate(Estimate_Total_Foreign_Born = coalesce(Estimate_Total_Foreign_Born, Estimate_Total_Foreign_born)) %>%
  select(-Estimate_Total_Foreign_born)
write.csv(all_data, "B05012.csv", row.names = TRUE)
```
